title: cli profile.save() non-atomic write corrupts profile.json on crash
description: cli/src/profile.rs:132: save() calls std::fs::write(&path, json) which truncates and writes non-atomically. A process kill mid-write leaves a partial file. load() silently returns an empty map on parse failure — all profile fields are silently discarded with no recovery path. Fix: write to a temp file in the same directory, then rename atomically (same fix pattern as nie-x80a.5 for params.rs).
